ui_main_tip: Share your ID with a friend; the game will start automatically once connected.
ui_ready_status_waiting: Waiting for both players to click Start...
ui_orientation_warning: Please rotate your device to portrait mode to play.
log_overflow_full: [Action] {0}'s Overflow is full; gains 1 additional Action Point
log_shield_bash_slam: [Hit] Slammed into a wall! Takes {0} additional damage and suffers Slow for 1 round
log_hit_normal: [Hit] {0} performs a basic attack, hitting {1} for {2} damage (Armor mitigated: {3})
log_miss_skill: [Dodge] The target shifts nimbly, successfully evading the skill strike!
log_miss_area: [Dodge] {0} is in a Concealed state, evading the area damage from {1}
log_miss_me: [Dodge] The skill was evaded by our side!
log_game_over_draw: Game Over: Both sides perished simultaneously—it's a Draw!
log_purify_arrow_hit: [Skill Effect] {0} purified {1} status effects, dealing an additional {2} damage
sys_local_scan: [Dev Mode Detection] Automatically traversing directory via local HTTP index: {0}
sys_online_scan: [Online Deployment Detection] Securely matching resource manifest via filelist.json: {0}
sys_scan_skip: [Scan Skipped] Directory does not exist or server denied directory listing access: {0}
sys_scan_skip_list: [Scan Skipped] Unable to read static manifest filelist.json
sys_preload: Starting automatic scan and preloading of all game scripts...
sys_char_fail: Failed to automatically identify character cards; please ensure Live Server has directory browsing enabled:
sys_char_data_err: Character selection data anomaly detected; please select again
sys_buff_load_fail: [Load Failed] Buff script not found: {0}. Please check if the file exists in the 'buff/' folder and if the filename matches exactly.
sys_area_load_fail: [Load Failed] Area script not found: {0}. Please check the 'area/' folder.
msg_security_err: Security Restriction! Please open this in a server environment (e.g., Vercel).
buff_slow_desc: Slow: Movement points remain at 0, and no Overflow points are gained at the start of the turn.
buff_poison_desc: Poison: Lose 1 HP per stack at the end of the turn.
buff_moveBoost_desc: Haste: Gain 1 extra Movement Point at the start of the turn.
buff_armorShred_desc: Armor Shred: Lose 1 Armor per stack.
buff_weakness_desc: Weakness: Deal 1 less damage per stack.
buff_heavyArmor_desc: Heavy Armor: Gain 1 Armor per stack.
skill_archer_s1_desc: Apply Slow to targets within range for {buffEffects.0.duration} turns (does not stack).
skill_archer_s2_desc: Fire a purifying arrow, removing all status effects from the target. Deals an additional {scripts.0.props.bonusPerBuff} damage for each buff removed
skill_archer_s3_desc: Unleashes a {areaEffect.rangeArgs}x{areaEffect.rangeArgs} Arrow Rain lasting {areaEffect.duration} rounds, dealing {damage} damage
area_arrowRain_desc: At the end of the enemy's turn, deals {areaEffect.damage} damage to targets within the Arrow Rain area
skill_swordsman_s1_desc: Deals {damage.0} damage to targets within range, {damage.1} times
skill_swordsman_s2_desc: Dashes to the destination, dealing {damage} damage to enemies along the path (Cannot pass through walls; can pass through water)
skill_swordsman_s3_desc: Deals {damage} damage and applies {buffEffects.0.stacks} stacks of Armor Break for {buffEffects.0.duration} rounds (Non-stackable)
skill_killer_s1_desc: Hurls a poisoned blade in a straight line, dealing {damage} damage to the first target hit and applying {buffEffects.0.stacks} stacks of Poison for {buffEffects.0.duration} rounds (Non-stackable)
skill_killer_s2_desc: Gain Stealth until the end of the next enemy turn.
skill_killer_s3_desc: Gain {buffEffects.0.duration} turns of Haste (Does not stack).
skill_defender_s1_desc: Knock back the enemy 2 tiles (Cannot pass through walls). If the enemy ends up against a wall after being knocked back, deal an additional {scripts.0.props.slamDamage} damage and apply 1 turn of Slow.
skill_defender_s2_desc: Deploy a 5x5 area of Holy Light.
skill_defender_s3_desc: Gain 1 AP, 3 turns of Heavy Armor (Rank 6), and 3 turns of Root.
area_holyLight_desc: At the start of the enemy turn, apply 1 turn of Weakness (Rank 6) to targets within the Holy Light area.
